room.shareCode: Share this code with your opponent

spawn_board.name: Spawn Board
spawn_board.description: Add a new board adjacent to the current one. Once per game.

erase.name: Erase
erase.description: Remove one of your opponent's marks.
erase.selectPrompt: Select an opponent mark to erase

nine_grid.name: 9 Grid
nine_grid.description: Transform the game into Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe.

mirror_strike.name: Mirror Strike
mirror_strike.description: Steal one of your opponent's marks and flip it to your color.
mirror_strike.selectPrompt: Select an opponent mark to steal

freeze.name: Freeze
freeze.description: Block a row or column for one full round.
freeze.selectPrompt: Select a row or column to freeze

double_down.name: Double Down
double_down.description: Place two marks in a single turn.

time_warp.name: Time Warp
time_warp.description: Undo the last two moves — one from each player.

errors.roomNotFound: Room not found. Check the code and try again.
errors.cardAlreadyUsed: You have already used that card.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
